children.heading: Agricultural commodity
children.label: 1 Agricultural commodity
children.text: The term “agricultural commodity” has the meaning given that term in .section 5602 of title 7

children.heading: Appropriate congressional committees
children.label: 2 Appropriate congressional committees
children.text: The term “appropriate congressional committees” has the meaning given that term in section 14 of the Iran Sanctions Act of 1996 (; note), as amended by section 102 of this Act.Public Law 104–17250 U.S.C. 1701

children.heading: Executive agency
children.label: 3 Executive agency
children.text: The term “executive agency” has the meaning given that term in .section 133 of title 41

children.heading: Family member
children.label: 4 Family member
children.text: The term “family member” means, with respect to an individual, a spouse, child, parent, sibling, grandchild, or grandparent of the individual.

children.heading: Iranian diplomats and representatives of other government and military or quasi-governmental institutions of Iran
children.label: 5 Iranian diplomats and representatives of other government and military or quasi-governmental institutions of Iran
children.text: The term “Iranian diplomat or representative of another government or military or quasi-governmental institution of Iran” means any of the Iranian diplomats and representatives of other government and military or quasi-governmental institutions of Iran (as that term is defined in section 14 of the Iran Sanctions Act of 1996 (; note)).Public Law 104–17250 U.S.C. 1701

children.heading: Knowingly
children.label: 6 Knowingly
children.text: The term “knowingly”, with respect to conduct, a circumstance, or a result, means that a person has actual knowledge, or should have known, of the conduct, the circumstance, or the result.

children.heading: Medical device
children.label: 7 Medical device
children.text: The term “medical device” has the meaning given the term “device” in .section 321 of title 21

children.heading: Medicine
children.label: 8 Medicine
children.text: The term “medicine” has the meaning given the term “drug” in .section 321 of title 21

children.heading: State
children.label: 9 State
children.text: The term “State” means each of the several States, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, American Samoa, Guam, the United States Virgin Islands, and any other territory or possession of the United States.

children.label: A
children.text: a natural person who is a citizen or resident of the United States or a national of the United States (as defined in ; andsection 1101(a) of title 81So in original. Probably should be “title 8);”.1

children.label: B
children.text: an entity that is organized under the laws of the United States or any State.
